title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Tata Memorial Centre

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Tata Memorial Centre
jsonLd.description:
Tata Memorial Centre, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata Memorial Centre:
Tata Memorial Centre is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Memorial Centre!
